title: Gala Dinner
content: Mar, 17 2018 at 07:00 pm Eutopia Resort Gala Dinner “Fondest memories are made when gathered around table”. After the musical evening, all the alumni were invited to have dinner with dignitaries of university at Eutopia on 17th March 2018. A formal welcome, interactions, various fun games and memento distribution marked the evening at its best. The splendid food and drinks along with heating the dance floor with the beats will be memorable. Memories marked a success and added another page to the JUIT celebrations calendar. <
